det_check_template:
proof fn det_ptr_ref2<'a, T>(ptr: *const T, perm: &PointsTo<T>, r1: SharedReference<
    'a,
    T,
>, r2: SharedReference<
    'a,
    T,
>)
    requires (perm.ptr() == ptr), (perm.is_init()),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (r1.value() == perm.value())
            &&& (r1.ptr().addr() == ptr.addr())
            &&& (r1.ptr()@.metadata == ptr@.metadata)
            &&& (r2.value() == perm.value())
            &&& (r2.ptr().addr() == ptr.addr())
            &&& (r2.ptr()@.metadata == ptr@.metadata)
        }) ==> det_ptr_ref2_equal::<T>(r1, r2),
{
{ASSUMES}}
